title: ChargePoint Q2 FY26: Margin Improvements Continue Despite Flat Revenue
text: ChargePoint's Q2 FY26 results show that the company is making progress on margin improvement despite flat revenue performance. The adjusted EBITDA loss improved to negative $22 million or 22% of revenue in Q2 FY26, compared to negative $34 million or 31% of revenue in Q2 FY25, representing significant year-over-year improvement. Non-GAAP gross margin of 33% reflects the company's strategic focus on shifting mix toward higher-margin subscription revenue. This demonstrates that even with revenue challenges, the company is executing on its cost management and margin expansion strategy.
